items.title: LIVE: Suspect in UnitedHealth CEO's killing Luigi Mangione in New York court for arraignment
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Outside a Manhattan courtroom where Luigi Mangione, the man suspected of fatally shooting UnitedHealth Group chief executive Brian Thompson, is set to be arraigned on state murder charges that brand him a terrorist.

items.title: Honda and Nissan start merger talks in historic pivot | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Honda and Nissan have started talks toward a potential merger, they said, a historic pivot for Japan's auto industry that underlines the threat Chinese EV makers now pose to some of the world's best known car makers.

items.title: Trump threatens to retake Panama Canal control, and more - Five stories you need to know | Reuters
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
1. President-elect Donald Trump threatened to reassert U.S. control over the Panama Canal on Sunday, accusing Panama of charging excessive rates to use the Central American passage and drawing a sharp rebuke from Panamanian President Jose Raul Mulino.

2. Honda and Nissan are in talks to merge by 2026, they said on Monday, a historic pivot for Japan's auto industry that underlines the threat Chinese EV makers now pose to the world's long-dominant legacy car makers.

3. A bridge connecting two states in Brazil's northern and northeastern regions collapsed on Sunday as vehicles were crossing, killing at least one person and spilling sulfuric acid into the Tocantins River.

4. South Korea's military said on Monday it has detected signs of North Korea preparing to send more troops and weapons, including suicide drones, to Russia to support its war against Ukraine.

5. Britain's economy failed to grow during the first three months of Prime Minister Keir Starmer's new government, official figures showed on Monday, adding to signs of a slowdown that has cast a shadow over his time in office so far. 
#News #donaldtrump #trump #us #panamacanal #honda #nissan #mitsubishi #brazil #sulfuricacid #bridgecollapse #southkorea #northkorea #russia #russiaukrainewar #ukeconomy #ukraine #globaleconomy #britain #uk  #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: Brace! Risks stack up for the global economy in 2025 | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
In 2024, the world finally managed to get a grip on record inflation. Now, the concern for 2025 is that mounting geopolitical risks could either trigger a fresh bout of inflation or send the global economy into a tailspin.
 
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #world #business #globaleconomy #politics #inflation #geopolitics

items.title: Trump's Panama Canal threat, German Christmas market suspect, Nissan-Honda and holiday booze
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
President-elect Donald Trump has threatened to reassert U.S. control over the Panama Canal, accusing Panama of charging steep prices to use the passage. A man suspected of ploughing a car through crowds at a German Christmas market and killing five people faces multiple charges of murder and attempted murder. Nissan and Honda eye a possible merger. And inflation has left some drinkers looking for ways to rein in their holiday booze spending.

#donaldtrump #panamacanal #trump #presidentelect #us #germany #christmasmarket #magdeburg #nissan #honda #mitsubishi #merger #inflation #starbucks #reuters #news #morningheadlines #morningnews
